doc: Capability manifest the LLM is given so it can translate a scene design into a precise render spec. Shared vocabulary (position/theme) + per-effect content & style. Proof-of-concept subset across 3 categories / 2 backends.

position.doc: Where to place the element. A named anchor OR a normalized {x,y} in 0..1. Same meaning on both backends.

effects.purpose: Emphasize one number/stat with a drawn circle + caption underneath.
Reveal a short headline word-by-word, accenting key words.
Animated count-up number with a caption (a stat reveal).
